name: pi-config
//workspaces: npm workspaces are intentionally NOT enabled. Only extensions/ask-user has a package.json; extensions/cwd-skills, extensions/safeguard, extensions/skill-pruner, extensions/subagent, and extensions/web-access-compat are resolved by the root test runner via direct globs and typechecked from the extension package. Activating workspaces would require package.json files for each and would break root npm install. Track enabling this in docs/internal/code-review/TODO-archive.md.

scripts.typecheck: npm run shared:typecheck && npm run extension:typecheck && npm run analytics:typecheck && npm run extensions:typecheck
scripts.extensions:test: node ./scripts/run-tests.mjs --package cwd-skills --package safeguard --package skill-pruner --package subagent --package web-access-compat
scripts.extensions:typecheck: npm --prefix extension run typecheck:skill-pruner -- && npm --prefix extension run typecheck:web-access-compat --
